hero.headline: A clear process from first call to final handover.
hero.subheadline: We believe clients should understand every step before committing time, money, and trust to a project.

step1.title: Initial Consultation
step1.description: We understand your project idea, goals, budget, and location in a free consultation call.

step2.title: Site Visit & Study
step2.description: We visit the site to understand real conditions, access, orientation, and practical requirements.

step3.title: Design & Visualization
step3.description: We create design concepts, 3D visualizations, and layout directions for your review.

step4.title: BOQ & Budget Estimate
step4.description: We prepare a Bill of Quantities and a realistic cost estimate before any commitment.

step5.title: Execution & Supervision
step5.description: We coordinate execution, supervise quality, track progress, and keep you informed throughout.

estimator.headline: Project Budget Estimator
estimator.subheadline: Get an early-stage cost estimate before your site visit.
